summary: Completed testing of iteration 128 features: Admin Content Builder preset packs, Policy Report panel, Publish guard, Runtime components, and Component Library. All major features working correctly.

minor.issue: Intermittent DB_ERROR 503 during draft creation (transient MeiliSearch background worker timeout)

issues: React hydration warning: span cannot be child of select/option - caused by dev tooling wrappers, not functional issue

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed pages for policy testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 128 are working. Preset packs (home-default-pack, search-l1-pack, search-l2-pack, listing-detail-pack, listing-create-stepx-pack) apply correctly. Policy report endpoint returns fix_suggestion in checks[] and suggested_fixes array. Runtime components on Home/Search pages work without JS errors. Component Library grouped/collapsible UI and quick search are functional.

preset_packs.listing-detail-pack: PASS - Applied correctly with media+price+seller+map+similar listings
preset_packs.listing-create-stepx-pack: PASS - Applied correctly with default-content+text+doping+ad components

policy_report.fix_suggestion_in_checks: PASS - Each check[] item contains fix_suggestion field
policy_report.suggested_fixes_array: PASS - Report contains suggested_fixes[] array (empty when all pass)
policy_report.policy_enforcement: PASS - listing_create policy blocks draft without default-content

publish_guard.policy_fail_blocks_publish: PASS - Draft creation blocked when default-content missing
publish_guard.policy_pass_allows_publish: PASS - Publish succeeds when policy passes

runtime_components.homepage: PASS - Sliders, listing cards, categories working without JS errors
runtime_components.search_page: PASS - Filter panel, list/map view, sorting working
runtime_components.ilan_ver_redirect: PASS - Correctly redirects to login (auth required)

component_library.grouped_collapsible: PASS - Component groups visible (Temel Builder Bileşenleri: 6)
